tools.title: Gene Coordinate Extractor
tools.description: Retrieve exonic and intronic coordinates for human genes using MANE Select transcripts. Supports hg38 and hg19 assemblies with BED file export.

tools.title: EasySurv
tools.description: Code-free survival analysis platform. Kaplan-Meier plots, Cox regression, competing risks, biomarker optimization, and AI-powered result narration.

tools.title: Mutation Waterfall Plot Generator
tools.description: Generate publication-ready oncoplot / waterfall plots from mutation data. Visualize mutation landscapes across patient cohorts with customizable styling.

links.title: PubMed — Complete Publication List
links.description: A complete and updated list of our papers on PubMed.

links.title: Patkar Lab on GitHub
links.description: Open-source code, pipelines and tools developed by the group.

links.title: ACTREC
links.description: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer.

links.title: Tata Memorial Centre
links.description: Our parent institution in Mumbai, India.
